Order Custom Logo Banners for Professional Business Display

Make the most of your next event with an eye-catching logo banner that showcases your brand professionally. From trade shows and in-store displays to corporate events and outdoor promotions, our custom logo banners help you improve visibility and make an unforgettable first impression with high-quality vinyl construction and vibrant full-color printing.

Our professional logo banners are designed to withstand both indoor and outdoor conditions, featuring durable 13oz vinyl material that resists fading, tearing, and weather damage. Each banner is custom printed with your logo using state-of-the-art large-format printers for sharp detail and brilliant colors that represent your brand with professional quality.

At Banners.com, we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who ensure every logo banner meets our strict quality standards. If something doesn't meet our standards, our staff of in-house graphic designers will contact you to fix it immediately.

We offer logo banners in sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', with unlimited design options through our online designer tool. You can choose your production time to ensure your logo banner is delivered when you need it for your event or business display.

Key Features:

  • Professional 13oz vinyl construction for durability
  • Full-color printing with fade-resistant inks
  • Custom sizes from small displays to large outdoor installations
  • Indoor and outdoor weather resistance
  • Professional finishing options including grommets and pole pockets
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your deadline
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Logo Banner Material Options for Indoor & Outdoor Use

Your custom logo banner is manufactured using premium vinyl materials designed for professional business displays and long-lasting durability in various environments.

13oz Vinyl Banner Material:

  • Heavy-duty construction resists tearing and punctures
  • Weather-resistant for outdoor logo displays
  • Smooth surface accepts high-resolution printing
  • Flexible material allows for easy installation and storage
  • UV-resistant coating prevents fading in sunlight

Material Benefits for Logo Applications:

  • Maintains logo color vibrancy in all weather conditions
  • Professional appearance suitable for corporate environments
  • Lightweight yet durable for various mounting options
  • Compatible with all standard finishing options
  • Manufactured in the USA with quality materials

Size Tolerance Information: Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing and finishing. Our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot. Contact customer service if your logo banner requires precise dimensions.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Professional Logo Banner Installation

Choose from professional finishing options designed to make your logo banner installation secure and professional-looking for any business or event display.

Grommet Installation:

  • Heavy-duty metal grommets every 2-3 feet along edges
  • Rust-resistant brass construction for outdoor durability
  • Allows secure mounting with rope, bungee cords, or zip ties
  • Professional appearance suitable for business displays

Pole Pocket Options:

  • Top pole pocket for banner pole mounting systems
  • Bottom pole pocket adds weight for wind resistance
  • Clean appearance without visible mounting hardware
  • Ideal for trade show displays and indoor installations

Hem and Tape Reinforcement:

  • Double-folded hems provide extra strength along edges
  • Heat-welded construction prevents separation
  • Professional finished appearance
  • Extends banner lifespan in outdoor conditions

Installation Recommendations:

  • Outdoor installations: Use grommets with secure tie-downs
  • Indoor displays: Pole pockets provide clean professional look
  • Temporary events: Grommets offer quick setup and removal
  • Permanent installations: Reinforced hems for long-term durability
PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Logo Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We offer flexible production schedules to ensure your custom logo banner arrives when you need it for your business event or display deadline.

Standard Production:

  • 3-5 business days production time
  • Includes design review and approval process
  • Quality inspection before shipping
  • Most cost-effective option for planned events

Rush Production Available:

  • 1-2 business day production for urgent needs
  • Same quality standards and materials
  • Priority processing through all production stages
  • Additional rush charges apply

Production Process Timeline:

  • Design Phase: Logo artwork review and approval (same day)
  • Printing: Large-format printing with quality inspection (1-2 days)
  • Finishing: Grommet installation and hemming (1 day)
  • Quality Control: Final inspection and packaging (same day)

Factors Affecting Production Time:

  • Logo artwork quality and resolution
  • Banner size and complexity
  • Finishing options selected
  • Current production volume
  • Design revisions or approvals needed

Production times begin after final artwork approval. Our design team will contact you if your logo requires any adjustments for optimal print quality.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Logo Banner Payment & Ordering Options

We offer convenient payment methods and ordering options to make purchasing your custom logo banner simple and secure.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Major credit cards (Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover)
  • PayPal for secure online transactions
  • Business checks for corporate accounts
  • Purchase orders for established business customers

Online Ordering Process:

  • Select logo banner size and finishing options
  • Upload your logo or use our design service
  • Review digital proof before production
  • Secure payment processing with immediate confirmation

Business Account Benefits:

  • Net payment terms for qualified businesses
  • Bulk pricing for multiple logo banner orders
  • Dedicated customer service representative
  • Streamlined reordering process

Custom Quote Options:

  • Special sizes beyond standard dimensions
  • Large quantity discounts
  • Unique finishing requirements
  • Complex logo applications or specialty materials

Order Security: All transactions are processed through secure SSL encryption to protect your payment information and business details.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Logo Banner Delivery

We provide reliable shipping options to ensure your custom logo banner arrives safely and on time for your business event or installation.

Standard Shipping Options:

  • Ground shipping: 3-7 business days after production
  • Expedited shipping: 2-3 business days delivery
  • Overnight shipping: Next business day delivery available
  • Local pickup available at our facility

Logo Banner Packaging:

  • Banners up to 8 feet folded in protective packaging
  • Larger banners rolled in sturdy shipping tubes when possible
  • Extra protection for outdoor weather resistance during transit
  • Professional packaging suitable for business addresses

Large Banner Shipping:

  • Banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded
  • Custom freight shipping available for oversized orders
  • Contact customer service for freight quotes on large installations
  • Specialty packaging for trade show shipments

Shipping Considerations:

  • Business addresses recommended for large banner deliveries
  • Signature confirmation available for valuable orders
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments
  • Insurance available for high-value logo banner orders

Delivery Timing: Plan your logo banner order to allow adequate time for production plus shipping. Contact customer service if you need delivery by a specific event date.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Business & Event Uses for Professional Logo Banners

Custom logo banners provide versatile marketing and branding solutions for businesses, organizations, and events of all types.

Trade Shows & Exhibitions:

  • Booth backdrop displays featuring company logos
  • Hanging banners for overhead brand visibility
  • Table banners for professional presentation areas
  • Directional signage with logo branding

Retail & Storefront Applications:

  • Grand opening announcements with business logos
  • Sale and promotion banners maintaining brand identity
  • Window displays featuring product logos
  • Outdoor storefront advertising with weather-resistant logos

Corporate Events & Meetings:

  • Conference backdrop banners with company branding
  • Welcome banners featuring organizational logos
  • Award ceremony displays with sponsor logos
  • Employee recognition events with corporate identity

Outdoor Advertising & Promotions:

  • Construction site banners with contractor logos
  • Event sponsorship displays featuring brand logos
  • Parade entries with organizational branding
  • Festival vendor displays with business identity

Sports & Recreation:

  • Team sponsor banners with logo recognition
  • Tournament displays featuring league branding
  • Championship banners with organizational logos
  • Facility identification with club or business logos
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Logo Banner Artwork Requirements for Print Quality

Follow these artwork specifications to ensure your logo prints with professional quality and sharp detail on your custom banner.

Logo File Requirements:

  • High-resolution files: 150 DPI minimum at final print size
  • Vector formats preferred: AI, EPS, PDF with embedded fonts
  • Raster formats acceptable: PNG, TIFF, high-resolution JPG
  • CMYK color mode for accurate color reproduction

Logo Design Considerations:

  • Avoid fine details that may not reproduce clearly at distance
  • Use bold fonts and clear lettering for readability
  • Ensure adequate contrast between logo and background colors
  • Consider viewing distance when sizing logo elements

Color Specifications:

  • CMYK color values ensure consistent color matching
  • Pantone colors can be converted to CMYK equivalents
  • RGB colors acceptable but may shift during printing
  • Avoid extremely dark backgrounds that require heavy ink coverage

File Preparation Tips:

  • Convert all text to outlines or embed fonts
  • Flatten transparency effects and complex filters
  • Include bleed area if logo extends to banner edges
  • Provide multiple file formats when possible

Design Assistance Available:

  • Professional design service for logo banner layouts
  • Logo enhancement and optimization for print
  • Color correction and file format conversion
  • Digital proof provided before production begins

Our design team will review your logo artwork and contact you if any adjustments are needed for optimal print quality on your banner.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design & Order Your Custom Logo Banner Today

Ready to create a professional logo banner that showcases your brand with impact? Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to design and order custom logo banners that meet your exact specifications and deadline requirements.

Why Choose Banners.com for Logo Banners:

  • Over 20 years of experience in custom banner printing
  • In-house design team and production facility in the USA
  • State-of-the-art printing technology for vibrant logo reproduction
  • Strict quality control ensures every banner meets our standards
  • Fast turnaround times to meet your event deadlines
  • Professional customer service from order to delivery

Get Started Today:

  • Choose your banner size and finishing options above
  • Upload your logo file or request professional design assistance
  • Review and approve your digital proof
  • Receive your professionally printed logo banner

Need Help with Your Order? Our customer service team is ready to assist with logo banner specifications, artwork requirements, or custom sizing options. Call us at (320) 391-5300 or contact us online for personalized assistance.

Custom Quote Available: For special projects, unique sizes, larger quantity orders, or specialty logo applications, request a custom quote for personalized pricing and specifications.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Logo Banner Questions & Answers

Are logo banners printed in full color?

Yes, all logo banners are printed in full color using state-of-the-art large-format printers. We can reproduce your logo in unlimited colors with sharp detail and vibrant color accuracy. Our printing process ensures your brand colors are represented professionally and consistently.

How do I get logo banner design assistance?

Our professional design team offers logo banner layout services to help optimize your logo for banner display. Simply select our design service option during ordering and provide your logo file along with any specific requirements. Our designers will create a custom banner layout and provide a digital proof for your approval.

What is the maximum logo banner size available?

We can produce logo banners up to 8 feet by 50 feet through our standard ordering system. For larger installations or unique dimensions, contact our customer service team for a custom quote. We regularly produce oversized banners for large-scale logo displays and outdoor advertising applications.

Are logo banners available double-sided?

Yes, we offer double-sided printing for logo banners that will be viewed from both sides. Double-sided banners feature your logo printed on both the front and back, with a blockout layer in between to prevent show-through. This option is ideal for hanging displays, pole-mounted banners, and applications where both sides will be visible.

What file formats do you accept for logo artwork?

We accept vector files (AI, EPS, PDF) and high-resolution raster files (PNG, TIFF, JPG). Vector formats are preferred for logos as they can be scaled to any size without quality loss. If you only have a low-resolution logo file, our design team can help enhance it for optimal print quality.

How long do logo banners last outdoors?

Our vinyl logo banners are designed for outdoor durability and typically last 2-3 years in normal outdoor conditions. The 13oz vinyl material and UV-resistant inks provide excellent weather resistance, maintaining logo color vibrancy and material integrity through various weather conditions.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
